zh.lifeSummary: John Gooch於1600年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾斯利布利其。他於1622年與Ruth Hammond在英國格盧斯特斯爾斯利布利其結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他於1600年住在英國諾福爾可凱特林加姆。他去世於1667年5月7日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼威爾斯享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: John Gooch于1600年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾斯利布利其。他于1622年与Ruth Hammond在英国格盧斯特斯爾斯利布利其结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他于1600年住在英国諾福爾可凱特林加姆。他去世于1667年5月7日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼威爾斯享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: Gooch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (East Anglia): from the rare Middle English personal name Goche (also found as Joche). It was current in East Anglia from the early 12th to the early 13th centuries as a variant of Anglo-Norman French Go(s)ce, Jo(s)ce, a pet form of Old French Goscelin.
English: alternatively, a nickname from Anglo-Norman French gouge (from Latin gobio), the nominative form of Old French goujon (from Latin gobionem) ‘gudgeon’, perhaps for a gullible person.

Welsh: in southwestern England, possibly an Anglicized form of Welsh coch, goch ‘red(-haired)’, though the sound change is irregular. Compare Gough . It may also be a variant of Cornish and Welsh Couch , with the same meaning.

variants.name: Gough
meanings: Welsh: from coch, goch ‘red(-haired)’. The mutated form goch is normal after a personal name. In England, where the surname occurs from Welsh migration, it may have become hereditary in medieval times but this development was probably much later in Wales. Compare Gooch and Couch , which may sometimes derive from the same source.
Irish (especially Waterford and Dublin): shortened form of   McGough  .

variants.name: Gouge
meanings: English: variant of   Gooch   or   Couch  .

variants.name: Googe
meanings: English (Cambridgeshire and Lincolnshire): variant of   Gooch  .

variants.name: Couch
meanings: English (Cornwall and Devon): nickname from Middle English couch(e) ‘hump, hunch’, used for a hunchback. In Cornwall and Devon it is usually pronounced as Cooch.
English (Cornwall and Devon): variant of   Gooch  .

English (Cornwall and Devon): from Middle English coche, couche ‘bed, couch, tablecloth’ (Old French couche, culche). It could have been a metonymic occupational name for someone who made such items or a nickname for a lazy individual. Alternatively, it could have been applied to someone who produced couchwork, a luxurious embroidery in which gold or silver thread and jewels were sewn into satin or silk robes.

variants.name: Gotch
meanings: Welsh: Anglicized form of Welsh coch, goch ‘red(-haired)’; see Gooch 3.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."
Historical Boundaries: 1716: York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1776: York, Massachusetts, United States 1820: York, Maine, United States

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

Historical Boundaries: 1642: Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1653: Yorkshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1664: Maine, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1668: York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1680: Massachusetts Claim, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1691: York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1776: York, Massachusetts, United States 1820: York, Maine, United States

en.lifeSummary: John Gooch was born in 1600, in Slimbridge, Gloucestershire, England. He married Ruth Hammond in 1622, in Slimbridge, Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. He lived in Ketteringham, Norfolk, England in 1600. He died on 7 May 1667, in Wells, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 67.

it.lifeSummary: John Gooch è nato il nel 1600 nel Slimbridge, Gloucestershire, England. Lui sposato Ruth Hammond nel 1622, nel Slimbridge, Gloucestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie. Vissuto a Ketteringham, Norfolk, England nel 1600. Morì il 7 maggio 1667, nel Wells, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Goochは1600年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアスリンブリッジで生まれた。1622年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアスリンブリッジでRuth Hammondと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1600年にはイギリスノーフォルクケッテリンガムに住んでいた。彼は1667年5月7日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーウエルズで67歳で死去した。

ko.Wells, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, B: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 웰스

ko.lifeSummary: John Gooch(은)는 1600년 영국 그루스스터실르 슬림브리지에서 태어났다. 그는 1622년 영국 그루스스터실르 슬림브리지에서 Ruth Hammond(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1600년도에 영국 노르폴크 케테링함에서 살았다. 그는 1667년 5월 7일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 웰스에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: John Gooch nasceu em 1600, em Slimbridge, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Ele casou-se com Ruth Hammond em 1622, em Slimbridge, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele viveu em Ketteringham, Norfolk, Inglaterra em 1600. Ele faleceu em 7 de maio de 1667, em Wells, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: John Gooch родился в 1600 г. в местности слимбридж, глоусестиршир, Англия. Он женился на женщине по имени Ruth Hammond в 1622 г. в местности слимбридж, глоусестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. Он жил в местности кеттирингхам, норфолк, Англия в 1600 году. Он умер 7 мая 1667 г. в местности веллс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: John Gooch nació en 1600, en Slimbridge, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Se casó con Ruth Hammond en 1622, en Slimbridge, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas. Vivió en Ketteringham, Norfolk, Inglaterra en 1600. Murió el 7 de mayo de 1667, en Wells, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 67 años.
